About Me

Hi, my name is Ayoub Aguezar, an Software & Data Engineering Student who wishes to participate in creating greener and more meaningful digital environments. When it comes to using design as a means of communication, I follow an approach that is very much inclined towards Minimalism, Creativity, and thoughtfulness. Learning new things, especially those that are nothing less than challenging for my cognitive abilities and that are beneficial to my professional development.

Latest Projects

View all Projects

Restaurant

Experience the authentic taste of Ouarzazate through "Snack العائلة". A modern and responsive showcase platform built meticulously with Vanilla JavaScript and CSS, delivering a warm Moroccan-inspired interface, smooth scroll animations, and interactive elements like a digital menu, lightbox gallery, and customer review carousels.

weather-map

A modern and interactive web application providing real-time weather forecasts for major cities in Morocco. Built with Next.js 14 and TypeScript, it features an interactive Leaflet map, dynamic day/night switching, and smooth scroll animations.

DevOps CI/CD Automation

Automated CI/CD pipeline for dual-platform repository management. Synchronizes GitHub and GitLab workflows using YAML-based automation to ensure repository consistency and secure multi-platform distribution.

Website Metadata API REST

Website Metadata API REST is a simple and efficient RESTful API built with Node.js and Express. It allows developers to extract useful metadata from any public website using a single HTTP request. This API is ideal for SEO tools, link previews, dashboards, and automation workflows.
